faqs.question: What chargers and headphones are compatible with my device?
faqs.answer: All devices are compatible with any standard USB-C charger for charging. You can also use any headphones with a standard 3.5mm audio jack or connect Bluetooth headphones for a wireless listening experience.
faqs.keywords: USB-C charger, USB C, charger, charging, headphones, wired headphones, Bluetooth headphones, Bluetooth, 3.5mm audio jack, compatible accessories

faqs.question: How do I add an app to the Home Screen?
faqs.answer:
Step 1: Swipe up from the bottom of the Home Screen to open the app drawer.

Step 2: Find the app you want to add.

Step 3: Tap and hold the app icon.

Step 4: Drag the app to your desired location on the Home Screen, then release it.
faqs.keywords: add app to Home Screen, app icon, app drawer, swipe up, move app, home screen, app shortcut, icon missing

faqs.question: What is Admin Mode, and why are some features blocked?
faqs.answer:
There is no need to worry about Admin Mode. Our devices are specifically designed to provide a distraction-free experience for camps and other supervised environments.

The Campfire and FyrFly Players are intended for listening to music, audiobooks, podcasts, FM radio, and reading books. To help keep users focused and prevent access to non-essential features, other apps and device settings are restricted through Admin Mode.

This is expected behavior and is part of the device's built-in management system.
faqs.keywords: admin mode, device management, restricted mode, blocked apps, settings locked, camp mode, restrictions, managed device

faqs.question: What are the dimensions of the Campfire Player 2, Campfire Player 2+, and FyrFly Player?
faqs.answer: The Campfire Player 2, Campfire Player 2+, and FyrFly Player all have the same dimensions, measuring approximately 4.5 inches x 2.1 inches (11.4 cm x 5.3 cm).
faqs.keywords: Campfire Player 2 dimensions, Campfire Player 2+ size, FyrFly dimensions, player size, measurements, device dimensions

faqs.question: Can I remove or delete Admin Mode?
faqs.answer:
No. Admin Mode is a built-in factory feature and cannot be removed from the device.

It is an essential part of the Campfire and FyrFly Players and helps ensure the device functions as intended. Certain settings and features are intentionally restricted to prevent unauthorized changes, app installations, or access to unsupported content. This helps provide a safe, distraction-free experience for camps and other supervised environments.
faqs.keywords: remove admin mode, delete admin mode, admin account, factory settings, device restrictions, managed device, settings locked

faqs.question: Can I set a password on my device?
faqs.answer:
No. We no longer support password protection on our devices.

This feature was removed because many users, especially children, would forget their passwords. Recovering access required a full factory reset, which erased all data and content stored on the device.

Removing password protection helps provide a simpler and more reliable experience for all users.
faqs.keywords: password, lock screen, screen lock, device password, PIN, passcode, security, factory reset

faqs.question: Can I use my device without Wi-Fi?
faqs.answer:
Yes! Once your content has been downloaded, your device can be used without a Wi-Fi connection.

There are two ways to add content to your device:

1. Use a streaming service
You can download music, audiobooks, and other content from supported streaming services, including Spotify, Apple Music, Amazon Music, and Audible.

After downloading your content, you can listen offline for up to 30 days. After that, simply reconnect the device to Wi-Fi so the streaming app can refresh your subscription, and you'll receive another 30 days of offline access.

2. Transfer your own music files
If you already have compatible audio files (such as MP3s) on your computer, you can transfer them to your device using the FyrFly Music app and a Box account.

To transfer your music:

Create a Box account.
Install the FyrFly Music app from the App Store on your device.
Upload your supported audio files to your Box account.
Open the FyrFly Music app.
Tap the menu icon and select Box Account.
Sign in to your Box account.
Select and download the songs you want on your device.

Once your files have been downloaded, they can be played anytime without a Wi-Fi connection.
faqs.keywords: Wi-Fi, offline mode, offline music, no internet, Spotify offline, Apple Music offline, Amazon Music offline, Audible offline, MP3 transfer, Box, FyrFly Music

faqs.question: Why do I need to connect my device to Wi-Fi every 30 days?
faqs.answer:
If you use a streaming service such as Spotify, Apple Music, Amazon Music, or Audible, you'll need to connect your device to Wi-Fi at least once every 30 days.

This is a requirement of the streaming providers to verify that your subscription is still active and to ensure artists and content creators are properly compensated. Once the device reconnects to Wi-Fi and your subscription is verified, you'll receive another 30 days of offline listening.
faqs.keywords: 30 days, Wi-Fi every 30 days, offline listening, streaming subscription, Spotify offline, Apple Music offline, Amazon Music offline, Audible offline, license verification
